# terrible_vault (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ciphertext` (String) Ansible Vault encrypted string (the $ANSIBLE_VAULT;... blob).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source ID (set to 'vault').
- `plaintext` (String, Sensitive) Decrypted plaintext value.
